arts.ttl: 4 goalkeepers Barcelona should consider signing as Marc-Andre ter Stegen replacements
arts.sum: 19-year-old Guillaume Restes is reportedly 'under consideration' as a replacement for Ter Stegen during the January transfer window. Club captain and starting goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen was stretched off on the stroke of half-time with what has now been confirmed to be a season-ending knee injury.

arts.ttl: Source: Mbappé to miss 3 weeks with thigh injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid have confirmed that Kylian Mbappé suffered an injury to his left thigh during Tuesday's win over Alavés.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star ready to pay to play for Barcelona and solve injury crisis
arts.sum: Barcelona's first choice keeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has since undergone successful knee surgery but now faces several months out - and the Spanish giants reportedly see Wojciech Szczesny as the perfect replacement
